# Eurocentric

**A web API for modelling and analysing the Eurovision Song Contest, 2016-present.**

## Documentation

The [docs](docs/README.md) directory contains all documentation for the *Eurocentric* project.

- [Launch specification](./docs/launch_spec/README.md)
- [Scraped data](./docs/scraped_data/README.md)

## AI declaration

**No source code in this project was generated by an AI.**

All source code and test code was designed and written by the project developer (Matt Tantony). A tiny number of utility
classes are adapted from open source code. These are clearly identified in the source code comments and sources are
credited.

Microsoft Copilot was used in the following ways:

- proofreading the launch specification documents for typos, formatting issues, and inconsistencies between documents
- providing step-by-step instructions for containerizing the web application and deploying it to the Azure Container
  Apps service
- creating the scraped data JSON schemas
